QF.id: III-C Fraudulent and Unfair Trade Practices_8

question.text: Under the SEBI PFUTP Regulations, SEBI may direct an intermediary or person not to dispose of or alienate an asset forming part of:

answer.text: Any transaction above a certain value

explanation.text: **The Logic:** As per Section 8.3(e), SEBI may direct an intermediary or person not to dispose of or alienate an asset forming part of a fraudulent and unfair transaction. **The Trap:** This power is specifically linked to fraudulent transactions, not all transactions above a threshold. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** This asset-freezing power helps preserve evidence and prevent dissipation of proceeds of fraud.
